name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Cleveland, OH's US Cash Advance at 3328 W 32nd St offers fast payday loans and title loans with extended hours.
description_long:
US Cash Advance at 3328 W 32nd St, unit 104 in Cleveland, OH is a standalone storefront providing quick cash solutions to the local community. Located on West 32nd Street, this Cleveland branch operates extended hours to serve residents who need fast access to funds. Open Monday through Friday from 8AM to 9PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 10AM to 7PM, the Cleveland location accommodates working people and those with varied schedules.

This West 32nd Street location specializes in payday loans and title loans, delivering short-term financial solutions for residents of Cleveland, OH facing immediate cash needs. Contact the storefront directly at +1 216-777-5629 to discuss loan options, learn about current rates, or ask about application requirements. Staff at the 3328 W 32nd St location can explain terms and complete your application on-site.

If you're a Cleveland resident considering a payday or title loan, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information when you visit. These short-term loans help bridge financial gaps when unexpected expenses arise, though it's important to understand repayment terms and timelines. US Cash Advance serves Cleveland's West Side with straightforward, accessible lending.
pros: Open seven days a week including evenings (Mon–Fri 8am–9pm, Sat–Sun 10am–7pm)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit and no-credit-check applicants
No collateral required — all listed products are unsecured
Wide loan range: $100–$1,000 for payday/cash advance, up to $50,000 for bad credit loans
In-person Detroit location with staff praised in reviews for transparent, no-pressure service
Fast process — one reviewer reported full approval and funding within 45 minutes in-store
Customer rating of 4.4 (Excellent) across multiple reviewers
cons: Not a direct lender — borrowers are matched to unnamed third-party lenders whose rates and terms are unknown before applying
APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Official contact email uses a hosting-provider domain (kinsta.cloud), not a branded corporate address
Single physical location in Detroit; online applicants may be routed to lenders with no local presence or accountability
Loan product descriptions are generic and appear shared across many similar lead-gen sites, limiting ability to verify actual underwriting standards
best_for: Detroit-area residents who need in-person same-day payday loan or cash advance assistance
Borrowers with bad or no credit who need small amounts ($100–$1,000) quickly and have been turned down elsewhere
First-time borrowers who want face-to-face guidance through a loan application
Borrowers willing to compare third-party offers for larger bad credit personal loans up to $50,000
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area borrowers with poor credit who need $100–$1,000 quickly and prefer in-person service over fully online applications. The critical caveat is that it is a loan connector, not a direct lender — actual rates, fees, and approval are determined by third-party lenders whose terms are not disclosed upfront, so borrowers should review any offer carefully before signing.
services: In-person loan application at Detroit storefront
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 3328 W 32nd St, Cleveland, OH. Fast payday and title loans. Extended hours. Call 216-777-5629.
